title: openingHoursClosedDays
description: List of specific date ranges during which the event or place is considered closed, overriding the default opening hours. Only applicable for calendarType `periodic` and `permanent`. Sorted by startDate in GET responses.

startDate.description: Start of the closed date range (inclusive), in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Must fall within the main startDate/endDate of the event or place.

endDate.description: End of the closed date range (inclusive), in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be on or after startDate, and within the main startDate/endDate.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the closed period, as localized text. Maximum 1000 characters per language.
